column2: Derived from the official Census 2022 total population (62,027,503) excluding the population younger than 1 year, as Table 2.8 applies to persons aged 1 year and older.
2.8 Language most often spoken in the household
Table 2.8: Population distribution by language spoken most often in the household, Census 2022
Statistics South Africa. Census 2022 Statistical Release (P0301.4). Table 2.8: Population distribution by language spoken most often in the household, Census 2022.

Data represent the language spoken most often in the household for the population aged 1 year and older. The published table reports percentages; LangNav population counts are derived using the eligible population (excluding persons younger than 1 year). One response was recorded per individual.
